data.content: Plan complete for foolery-19f6. 5 changes across 3 workflow files: bump actions/checkout v4→v6, actions/upload-artifact v4→v6 (both node24), replace softprops/action-gh-release@v2 (still node20) with gh release upload CLI. oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 already node24. Verification strategy includes static actionlint, workflow_dispatch build-path test, AND a draft pre-release to validate the release:published asset upload path end-to-end (addressing prior review feedback). Low complexity, low risk, trivial rollback.
